title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Bakhtiarpur
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Bakhtiarpur constituency.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Bakhtiarpur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Bakhtiarpur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
